tasks.label: Copy Integration to custom_components
tasks.command: sudo rm -rf /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab && sudo mkdir -p /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab && sudo cp -r /addons/Poollab/custom_components/poollab/* /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab/ && echo 'Copied integration to /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab'

tasks.label: Start HA Core
tasks.command: sudo mkdir -p /run/supervisor && ha supervisor info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Supervisor is not running. Run Start Home Assistant first.'; exit 1; }; output=$(ha core start 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output"; case "$output" in *"Another job is running for job group home_assistant_core"*|*"Home Assistant Core is already running"*) echo 'HA Core is already running'; exit 0;; esac; exit $exit_code; fi; [ -n "$output" ] && echo "$output"; echo 'HA Core start command sent'

tasks.label: Restart HA Core
tasks.command: sudo mkdir -p /run/supervisor && ha supervisor info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Supervisor is not running. Run Start Home Assistant first.'; exit 1; }; output=$(ha core restart 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output"; case "$output" in *"Another job is running for job group home_assistant_core"*) echo 'HA Core job already in progress'; exit 0;; esac; output=$(ha core start 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output"; case "$output" in *"Another job is running for job group home_assistant_core"*) echo 'HA Core job already in progress'; exit 0;; esac; exit $exit_code; fi; fi; [ -n "$output" ] && echo "$output"; echo 'HA Core command sent'

tasks.label: Start Home Assistant
tasks.command: command -v supervisor_run >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Not inside Home Assistant dev container. Reopen in container first.'; exit 1; }; for f in /usr/bin/supervisor*; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; sudo chmod a+x "$f"; done; sudo mkdir -p /run/supervisor && sudo -E supervisor_run
